article_items.title: Watch BOE's Bailey: UK Banks Don't Have Access to Mythos - Bloomberg
article_items.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey says that British banks are still locked out of using Anthropic PBC’s powerful new AI tool. Speaking with Bloomberg's Stephanie Flanders at a central banking conference in Iceland, Bailey adds that banks are using other models to test their cyberdefenses.

article_items.title: Social Media Giants to Pay $27 Million to Settle School Lawsuit
article_items.description: The world’s biggest social media platforms agreed to pay about $27 million to settle a lawsuit filed by a rural Kentucky school district that alleged their products are addictive and helped create a teen mental health crisis that drained school resources.
article_items.excerpt: The world’s biggest social media platforms agreed to pay about $27 million to settle a lawsuit filed by a rural Kentucky school district that alleged their products are addictive and helped create a teen mental health crisis that drained school resources.
article_items.summary: , which owns Instagram and Facebook, is paying the school district $9 million, more than any of the other companies, according to documents released under the state’s open records laws. Google’s YouTube negotiated a payout of slightly more than $2 million, and was the only company that also agreed to provide the district with training programs to help teachers better use its video product in classrooms. Google’s YouTube negotiated a payout of slightly more than $2 million, and was the only company that also agreed to provide the district with training programs to help teachers better use its video product in classrooms. and TikTok each agreed to pay $8 million, the records show. and TikTok each agreed to pay $8 million, the records show.

article_items.title: AI Dangers Eclipse Nuclear Weapons at Singapore Defense Forum
article_items.description: The dangers of AI eclipsed those of nuclear weapons at a defense forum discussion on strategic stability in Singapore, as panelists warned it could reduce reaction times to the point where people make rash decisions.
article_items.excerpt: The dangers of AI eclipsed those of nuclear weapons at a defense forum discussion on strategic stability in Singapore, as panelists warned it could reduce reaction times to the point where people make rash decisions.
article_items.summary: Collapsing the so-called “OODA loop” - an acronym for observe, orient, decide and act - creates a sort of fog in which “a human can’t evaluate the situation fast enough,” said Lieutenant General Nauman Zakria , Commander of 1 Corps and Army Rocket Force Command of the Pakistan Army. The dangers of AI eclipsed those of nuclear weapons at a defense forum discussion on strategic stability in Singapore, as panelists warned it could reduce reaction times to the point where people make rash decisions. article_items.title: Ex-Shield AI Worker Sues Over ‘Profane, Egregious’ Acts by Senior Official
article_items.description: A new lawsuit accuses a senior official at Shield AI of “profane, egregious acts” of sexual harassment and alleges fraud and safety issues involving other workers at the defense tech startup.
article_items.excerpt: A new lawsuit accuses a senior official at Shield AI of “profane, egregious acts” of sexual harassment and alleges fraud and safety issues involving other workers at the defense tech startup.
article_items.summary: In one instance, during the summer of 2024, Lindsey showed Miller a picture of his genitalia laying atop a commemorative plate of former President Barack Obama, according to the complaint. A new lawsuit accuses a senior official at Shield AI of “profane, egregious acts” of sexual harassment and alleges fraud and safety issues involving other workers at the defense tech startup.
